subject: An abandoned spinning wheel in a dusty attic or loft workshop
description: A large wooden spinning wheel dominates the center of the image, set in what appears to be a cluttered attic or loft. Warm orange-amber firelight illuminates the scene from below and from a small torch or candle on the right side. The floor holds a wicker basket filled with yarn balls in various colors. Scattered around the room are hanging tools, a scythe or curved blade mounted high, an animal skull affixed to a rafter beam, and a small seated figure near a workbench on the right — barely distinguishable in the shadow. Cobwebs and dust suggest long abandonment. The wheel still has thread on its spindle.
foreground: Spinning wheel; basket of yarn balls
background: Cluttered attic interior; tools; skulls; warm firelight
